description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image globally and defines two stages: build and test. Add a build job that runs the global before_script (apt-get update and apt-get install -y libedit-dev) then compiles lisp.c and mpc.c with gcc --std=c99 -Wall lisp.c mpc.c -ledit -lm -o lisp, and stores the resulting lisp binary as an artifact in the lisp directory. Add a build-alpine job in the build stage that uses the frolvlad/alpine-gcc image, runs its before_script (apk update && apk add libedit-dev build-base) then the same gcc compile command, and also archives the lisp binary as an artifact. Add a test job in the test stage that depends on build, uses the python:3-slim image and runs python3 run-tests.py. Add a test-alpine job in the test stage that depends on build-alpine, uses the python:3-alpine image, runs its before_script (apk update && apk add libedit-dev build-base) then python3 run-tests.py. No caches, services, or special triggers are defined.
